leadText: Astral Barrage (Japanese: アストラルビット Astral Bit) is a damage-dealing Ghost-type move introduced during Generation VIII, in The Crown Tundra. It is the signature move of Shadow Rider Calyrex.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Astral Barrage deals damage to all adjacent opponents. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Astral Barrage cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh LA S V The user attacks by sending a frightful amount of small ghosts at opposing Pokémon. BD SP This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Astral Barrage is tied with Shadow Force for the highest base power of all Ghost-type moves , excluding Z-Moves , Max Moves , and G-Max Moves . Astral Barrage can only be registered in the mobile version of Pokémon HOME 's move Pokédex using a Smeargle that used Sketch to learn the move. This is possible in Pokemon Scarlet and Violet after The Indigo Disk DLC introduced Smeargle. It shares this trait with Glacial Lance , Behemoth Blade , Behemoth Bash , Ice Burn , and Freeze Shock .
